response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio matches the provided reference lyrics for 'Our Bright Parade' and 'Palette' extremely well.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference JSON lyrics for both songs, while manually transcribing the spoken MC parts from Suisei at 01:31 and Towa at 02:21.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed each block strictly to the vocal cords' onset and release to ensure excellent synchronization and avoid cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 君と在ることさ
subtitles.english: And here I am, right by your side

subtitles.original: 君と在ることなんだ
subtitles.english: Cause there you are, standing by my side

subtitles.original: ただいまを聞けば
subtitles.english: When you're back and open that door

subtitles.original: おかえりって叫ぶよ
subtitles.english: You'll hear us saying, "welcome home"

subtitles.original: 当たり前じゃないか
subtitles.english: Forever we'll be waiting

subtitles.original: parade, parade, parade! 輝くんだよ
subtitles.english: Parade, parade, parade! It's time to take the stage

subtitles.original: 暗がりを満たすのは 君だ 僕だ！
subtitles.english: We're gonna shine right through the darkness, open up, share your light!

subtitles.original: parade, parade, parade! 輝くんだよ
subtitles.english: Parade, parade, parade! It's time to take the stage

subtitles.original: 悔しさも愛しさも 連れておいで
subtitles.english: When disappointment gets in your way, love will shine, keeping you safe

subtitles.original: 風、夢、羽
subtitles.english: Feel the wind and wishes

subtitles.original: 飛び立てるさ
subtitles.english: Your wings will take you high

subtitles.original: ささやかな祈りは光
subtitles.english: These silent prayers will become our light

subtitles.original: 終わりなき兆し
subtitles.english: Guiding us on an endless flight

subtitles.original: 君と飛び込んでゆく 素敵なスタートさ
subtitles.english: Here I am ready to dive into a beautiful start with you

subtitles.original: ここから これから our bright parade, parade!
subtitles.english: Starting from here, starting right now, our bright parade, parade!

subtitles.original: それじゃあ、次のステージへ、GO! スタートです！
subtitles.english: Now then, let's GO to the next stage! Here we start!

subtitles.original: 風に吹かれて 誰も気づかぬよう
subtitles.english: Blown by the wind, no one notices

subtitles.original: 区別がつかない モノクロの世界
subtitles.english: Can't distinguish a monochrome world

subtitles.original: ホロライブ 4th Fes! お前ら！ 最後のステージだ！
subtitles.english: Hololive 4th Fes! Everyone! This is the final stage!

subtitles.original: 色を足しても 何も見えなくて
subtitles.english: Even adding colors, I can't see anything

subtitles.original: まるで私は 息を止めていた
subtitles.english: It's as if I had been holding my breath

subtitles.original: もういいよ
subtitles.english: It's fine now

subtitles.original: 遠くても 叶えたい私は
subtitles.english: Even if it's far away, I want to make it happen

subtitles.original: こんな世界 想いも抱きしめていたいのに
subtitles.english: I want to embrace my thoughts in this world, but...

subtitles.original: 夢のキャンバスに 居続ける意味は
subtitles.english: On the canvas of dreams, the meaning of continuing...

subtitles.original: この胸に輝いているストーリー
subtitles.english: This story is shining in my heart

subtitles.original: そして夜は その冷たさを\n
subtitles.english: And at night, melting that coldness...

subtitles.original: 溶かして 手を伸ばした
subtitles.english: I reached out my hand

subtitles.original: もういいよ
subtitles.english: It's fine now

subtitles.original: 遠くても 届けたい私は
subtitles.english: Even if it's far away, I want to deliver it

subtitles.original: 受け止めてく 涙も抱きしめていたいのに
subtitles.english: I want to embrace even my tears, but...

subtitles.original: 夢のキャンバスに 心込めるのは
subtitles.english: On the canvas of dreams, what I put my heart into...

subtitles.english: Is a story being drawn in this sky

subtitles.english: I reached out my hand

subtitles.original: もういいの

subtitles.original: 遠くても 叶えたい私の
subtitles.english: Even if it's far away, I want to make it happen

subtitles.original: こんな世界 想いも言葉で包んだ
subtitles.english: Wrapping my feelings in words in this world

subtitles.original: 夢のキャンバスに 色を足していく
